task_description: Add web UI dashboard, live data validation of evolution mechanism, end-to-end AI simulation, core moat (skill accumulation + project history), metrics visualization, security hardening, user scenarios, and stress testing. 10+ rounds of critical iteration.

issues_fixed: Issue 1: Dead path validation - wired _validate_path into startup and dashboard template serving
Issue 2: Start endpoint sanitization - applied HTML stripping and 500-char limit
Issue 3: Reflections.jsonl growth bound - added pruning at 1000 lines, keeps last 500
Issue 4: SkillAccumulator integration - wired into FeedbackLoop via optional param, called on project_complete
Issue 5: Scenario threshold comment - added explanatory comment about distributed failure scoring
Issue 6: Rate limiter cleanup - added periodic purge every 100 requests if dict exceeds 10000 keys
Issue 7: Auth on control endpoints - added docstring notes and .env.example production guidance
